ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or content of the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the article was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the article */,
  "status" TEXT /* Publication status (draft, published, archived) */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Total number of likes */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Total number of comments */,
  "featured_image" TEXT /* URL of the featured image */,
  "slug" TEXT /* URL-friendly version of the title */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the article */,
  "read_time" TEXT /* Estimated read time of the article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date and time the article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., author, editor, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "slug" TEXT /* URL-friendly version of the category name */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL of the category icon */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category assigned to the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "slug" TEXT /* URL-friendly version of the tag name */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL of the tag icon */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag assigned to the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Total number of likes for the comment */,
  "flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been flagged for moderation */,
  "reported_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the comment has been reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being liked */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being liked (NULL if article) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the like */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the like was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the view */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date of the view */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the view */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user making the view */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the view was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
